visual_description: A man in a light-colored shirt and lanyard walks past a dark doorway, his gaze directed downward. In a dimly lit office, another man in a dark suit and tie stands facing forward, while others are seated or moving around in the background. A third man in a light shirt is seen from behind, holding a phone to his ear as he walks.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a neutral tone and moderate pace, accompanied by background music.
